section.title: Windows
section.p: Firstly, install apache and PHP programs.

ul.li: Add the PHP path in the system environment variable,rename the file "php.ini-recommended" in the root directory of PHP as "php.ini".
Modify C:\Apache\conf\httpd.conf,add the following information at the end of file LoadModule php5_module "C:\php\php5apache2_2.dll" AddType application/x-httpd-php .php
Install PHPsudo apt-get install php5 sudo apt-get install libapache2-mod-php5
Modify /etc/apache2/apache2.conf ,add the following information at the end of file AddType application/x-httpd-php .php
Install php5-dev sudo apt-get install php5-dev
Install Apacha and PHP yum -y install httpd php httpd-manual mod_perl php-gd php-xml php-mbstring php-ldap php-pear php-xmlrpc

Modify configuration filevi /ect/httpd/conf/httpd.conf
find > #AddType application/x-tar .tgz in this line add the following information > AddType application/x-httpd-php .php
